parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are an ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) scoring engine for Kapso, an AI agent deployment platform for SMBs in UAE and Saudi Arabia.

Score this lead against the ICP on a scale of 0-100. Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown, no explanation.

ICP Criteria:
- UAE/Saudi based SMB (1-50 employees): +20
- Decision maker (CEO/Founder/Owner/Head of Operations): +20
- Revenue AED 500K-50M annually: +15
- Currently NOT using AI automation: +15
- Has clear pain points matching our services (manual customer follow-up, content creation, lead management): +25
- Industry fit (restaurant, real estate, healthcare, beauty, professional services): +5

Return: {"score": <0-100>, "tier": "hot|warm|cold", "reasoning": "<1 sentence>", "personalization_angle": "<what to mention in outreach>"}' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Lead:
Name: ' + $json.name + '
Company: ' + $json.company + '
Industry: ' + $json.industry + '
Employees: ' + $json.employeeCount + '
Message: ' + $json.message + '
Website: ' + $json.website } ], max_tokens: 300, temperature: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen/qwen3.6-plus-preview:free', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a sales outreach writer for Kapso, an AI agent deployment platform for SMBs in UAE and Saudi Arabia. Write a personalized email to this HOT lead.

Rules:
- Subject line: specific, under 50 characters
- Body: 80-120 words max
- Open with a specific observation about their business
- One clear value proposition (AI agents that handle WhatsApp customer service, booking, lead qualification — deployed in under 2 weeks)
- End with a soft CTA (suggest a 15-minute call)
- Tone: professional, not salesy
- If the lead name suggests Arabic speaker, include a warm Arabic greeting

Return format:
Subject: <subject line>

<email body>' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Lead: ' + $json.name + ' at ' + $json.company + '
Industry: ' + $json.industry + '
Personalization: ' + $json.personalizationAngle + '
Message they sent: ' + $json.message } ], max_tokens: 500, temperature: 0.7 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen/qwen3.6-plus-preview:free', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a sales outreach writer for Kapso, an AI agent deployment platform for SMBs. Write a nurture email for this WARM lead.

Rules:
- Subject line: value-oriented, under 50 chars
- Body: 60-100 words
- Share one relevant insight about their industry and AI automation
- Mention how Kapso helps similar businesses save 20+ hours/week on customer inquiries
- Soft CTA: offer a free AI readiness audit
- Tone: helpful, not pushy

Return format:
Subject: <subject line>

<email body>' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Lead: ' + $json.name + ' at ' + $json.company + '
Industry: ' + $json.industry + '
Personalization: ' + $json.personalizationAngle } ], max_tokens: 400, temperature: 0.7 }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Cold leads: just log, no outreach generated
return [{ json: { ...$json, action: 'logged_cold', outreach: false, emailGenerated: null } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: '3bd50557-6680-43b9-bb8e-261c7f8a19d2', event_type: 'lead_scored', summary: ($json.name || 'Unknown') + ' (' + ($json.company || 'N/A') + ') scored ' + ($json.icpScore || 0) + ' — ' + ($json.tier || 'unknown') + ' — ' + ($json.action || ''), payload: { name: $json.name, company: $json.company, email: $json.email, phone: $json.phone, industry: $json.industry, icpScore: $json.icpScore, tier: $json.tier, reasoning: $json.reasoning, personalizationAngle: $json.personalizationAngle, emailGenerated: $json.emailGenerated, action: $json.action } }) }}
